TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Kawakawasan_ratoh_lalood_ato_militangal, title = Kawakawasan_ratoh_lalood_ato_militangal, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kawakawasan_ratoh_lalood_ato_militangal} }

S.FORM: == lalood ato militangal 戰爭和出草 == Miliyas to niyaro' ci Maawil 馬阿維離開部落 Ira ko cecay a kapah ci Maawil ko ngangan ningra, itiraay i Takidis ko loma' ningra. Caayay ka hayien no niyaro'ay a finawlan to sakalakakeridan, maketer samaforaw tayra i Tomiyac a niyaro'. Tayni to tona niyaro' ira ko kakafahekaan a demak,o pifalod aca ningra i fadanglan ato pakih sano 'ayam sanay to a ma'efer. Mafana' to ko Takidisay a tamdaw,sapitahidangaw papinokay patikor malakakeridan,cowa ka liwaliwaen ningra ko pisata'ota'ong no tamdaw no Takidis,laplapen ningra a panokay koya Takidisay a tamdaw, takawen ningra a mi'ofang ko tamina no Takidis, yo minokay sato maleneng a ma'alol koya tamdaw no Takidis i riyar. Mipatay ko Pyuma a tamdaw to kaying no 'Amis O Pyuma atamdaw halafinay a pakatengil to nika'efer ni Maawil,orasaka, tayra a mipalafang ci Maawilan. Litemohen ni Maawil koya Pyuma a tamdaw, kinatolo a mifalic to riko', sakakinacecay o tolak no tomay, sakakinatosa o taloak no lokadaw, sakakinatolo o makamiday a kolah. Safaheka sa koya Pyuma a tamdaw, nikawrira, harateng han nangra o pikalona ni Maawil koni saan,laliw sato a ma'emin. Ya minokay koya Pyuma a tamdaw, malitemoh nangra ko kaying no Tomiyac niyaro',matayen nangra kina kaying. Mafana' ci Maawil tina demak, tadatata'ang ko keter ningra,orasaka, mipatay to kaying no Pyuma a paco'ay. Nanoyanan tata'ang tata'ang ko sapipaco'ayaw faloco' ni Maawil, cilacila a ma'efer tayra i niyaro' no Pyuma a militangal. Ora sato o Pyuma a tamdaw misaharaterateng to sapifarataw to pilitangal ni Maawil. Paco'ay ci Maawil 馬阿維報仇 Nengengen nangra i sera awa ko naripa'an ni Maawil, nani kafekangay a ma'efer sato ko piketon no sowal. Ira to ko nga'ayay a maharatengay no Pyuma a tamdaw, co'eneken nangra ko nicideman a 'aol i karomakatan ni Maawil,caka fana' ci Maawil tahafikod tona macidemay a 'aol macocok ko tiyad sadak sato ko tina'i ora to ko sakapatay ni Maawil. Mafana' to ko Tomiyac a niyaro' to kapatay ni Maawil, caka'eca ka tayni ko Pyuma a tamdaw a mipaco'ay, orasaka, o polong no niyaro' maforaw tayra i Cikasoan. Lalengatan no militangal出草的開始 Cisowal sa ko malitengay to wawa, "akaa ka matira ci Maawilan, maforaw ko niyaro' kasini'adaan ko finawlan, ci Maawil ko milengatay to matiniay a demak" saan. Ciharateng sato ko ka'emangay, saw iro mafelih ko sowal no malitengay, o Pyuma a tamdaw ko milengatay a mipatay to kaying no Takidis, o mipa'adingay ci Maawil to niyaro' sa tayra mipaco'ay to Pyuma a tamdaw, ano awaay ko pipa'ading ni Maawil, awa to ko tolas no Pyuma a tamdaw a mikari'ang to niyaro' no 'Amis kiya. == Pacefaday a tilid 註釋 ==
S.PHON: == ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ ato~u miɾitaŋaɾ ***** == miɾijas to~u nijaro~uʡ ʦi maawiɾ ******* ira ko~u ʦəʦaj a kapaħ ʦi maawiɾ ko~u ŋaŋan niŋra, itiraaj i takiɬ~ɮis ko~u ɾo~umaʡ niŋra. ʦaajaj ka ħajiən no~u nijaro~uʡaj a finawɾan to~u sakaɾakakəriɬ~ɮan, makətər samafo~uraw tajra i to~umijaʦ a nijaro~uʡ. tajni to~u to~una nijaro~uʡ ira ko~u kakafaħəkaan a ɬ~ɮəmak,o~u pifaɾo~uɬ~ɮ aʦa niŋra i faɬ~ɮaŋɾan ato~u pakiħ sano~u ʡajam sanaj to~u a maʡəfər. mafanaʡ to~u ko~u takiɬ~ɮisaj a tamɬ~ɮaw,sapitaħiɬ~ɮaŋaw papino~ukaj patiko~ur maɾakakəriɬ~ɮan,ʦo~uwa ka ɾiwaɾiwaən niŋra ko~u pisataʡo~utaʡo~uŋ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u takiɬ~ɮis,ɾapɾapən niŋra a pano~ukaj ko~uja takiɬ~ɮisaj a tamɬ~ɮaw, takawən niŋra a miʡo~ufaŋ ko~u tamina no~u takiɬ~ɮis, jo~u mino~ukaj sato~u maɾənəŋ a maʡaɾo~uɾ ko~uja tamɬ~ɮaw no~u takiɬ~ɮis i rijar. mipataj ko~u pjo~u~uma a tamɬ~ɮaw to~u kajiŋ no~u ʡamis o~u pjo~u~uma atamɬ~ɮaw ħaɾafinaj a pakatəŋiɾ to~u nikaʡəfər ni maawiɾ,o~urasaka, tajra a mipaɾafaŋ ʦi maawiɾan. ɾitəmo~uħən ni maawiɾ ko~uja pjo~u~uma a tamɬ~ɮaw, kinato~uɾo~u a mifaɾiʦ to~u riko~uʡ, sakakinaʦəʦaj o~u to~uɾak no~u to~umaj, sakakinato~usa o~u taɾo~uak no~u ɾo~ukaɬ~ɮaw, sakakinato~uɾo~u o~u makamiɬ~ɮaj a ko~uɾaħ. safaħəka sa ko~uja pjo~u~uma a tamɬ~ɮaw, nikawrira, ħaratəŋ ħan naŋra o~u pikaɾo~una ni maawiɾ ko~uni saan,ɾaɾiw sato~u a maʡəmin. ja mino~ukaj ko~uja pjo~u~uma a tamɬ~ɮaw, maɾitəmo~uħ naŋra ko~u kajiŋ no~u to~umijaʦ nijaro~uʡ,matajən naŋra kina kajiŋ. mafanaʡ ʦi maawiɾ tina ɬ~ɮəmak, taɬ~ɮatataʡaŋ ko~u kətər niŋra,o~urasaka, mipataj to~u kajiŋ no~u pjo~u~uma a paʦo~uʡaj. nano~ujanan tataʡaŋ tataʡaŋ ko~u sapipaʦo~uʡajaw faɾo~uʦo~uʡ ni maawiɾ, ʦiɾaʦiɾa a maʡəfər tajra i nijaro~uʡ no~u pjo~u~uma a miɾitaŋaɾ. o~ura sato~u o~u pjo~u~uma a tamɬ~ɮaw misaħaratəratəŋ to~u sapifarataw to~u piɾitaŋaɾ ni maawiɾ. paʦo~uʡaj ʦi maawiɾ ***** nəŋəŋən naŋra i səra awa ko~u naripaʡan ni maawiɾ, nani kafəkaŋaj a maʡəfər sato~u ko~u pikəto~un no~u so~uwaɾ. ira to~u ko~u ŋaʡajaj a maħaratəŋaj no~u pjo~u~uma a tamɬ~ɮaw, ʦo~uʡənəkən naŋra ko~u niʦiɬ~ɮəman a ʡao~uɾ i karo~umakatan ni maawiɾ,ʦaka fanaʡ ʦi maawiɾ taħafiko~uɬ~ɮ to~una maʦiɬ~ɮəmaj a ʡao~uɾ maʦo~uʦo~uk ko~u tijaɬ~ɮ saɬ~ɮak sato~u ko~u tinaʡi o~ura to~u ko~u sakapataj ni maawiɾ. mafanaʡ to~u ko~u to~umijaʦ a nijaro~uʡ to~u kapataj ni maawiɾ, ʦakaʡəʦa ka tajni ko~u pjo~u~uma a tamɬ~ɮaw a mipaʦo~uʡaj, o~urasaka, o~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u nijaro~uʡ mafo~uraw tajra i ʦikaso~uan. ɾaɾəŋatan no~u miɾitaŋaɾ***** ʦiso~uwaɾ sa ko~u maɾitəŋaj to~u wawa, "akaa ka matira ʦi maawiɾan, mafo~uraw ko~u nijaro~uʡ kasiniʡaɬ~ɮaan ko~u finawɾan, ʦi maawiɾ ko~u miɾəŋataj to~u matiniaj a ɬ~ɮəmak" saan. ʦiħaratəŋ sato~u ko~u kaʡəmaŋaj, saw iro~u mafəɾiħ ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u maɾitəŋaj, o~u pjo~u~uma a tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u miɾəŋataj a mipataj to~u kajiŋ no~u takiɬ~ɮis, o~u mipaʡaɬ~ɮiŋaj ʦi maawiɾ to~u nijaro~uʡ sa tajra mipaʦo~uʡaj to~u pjo~u~uma a tamɬ~ɮaw, ano~u awaaj ko~u pipaʡaɬ~ɮiŋ ni maawiɾ, awa to~u ko~u to~uɾas no~u pjo~u~uma a tamɬ~ɮaw a mikariʡaŋ to~u nijaro~uʡ no~u ʡamis kija. == paʦəfaɬ~ɮaj a tiɾiɬ~ɮ ** ==
S.FORM: == lalood ato militangal 戰爭和出草 == Miliyas to niyaro' ci Maawil 馬阿維離開部落 Ira ko cecay a kapah ci Maawil ko ngangan ningra, itiraay i Takidis ko loma' ningra. Caayay ka hayien no niyaro'ay a finawlan to sakalakakeridan, maketer samaforaw tayra i Tomiyac a niyaro'. Tayni to tona niyaro' ira ko kakafahekaan a demak,o pifalod aca ningra i fadanglan ato pakih sano 'ayam sanay to a ma'efer. Mafana' to ko Takidisay a tamdaw,sapitahidangaw papinokay patikor malakakeridan,cowa ka liwaliwaen ningra ko pisata'ota'ong no tamdaw no Takidis,laplapen ningra a panokay koya Takidisay a tamdaw, takawen ningra a mi'ofang ko tamina no Takidis, yo minokay sato maleneng a ma'alol koya tamdaw no Takidis i riyar. Mipatay ko Pyuma a tamdaw to kaying no 'Amis O Pyuma atamdaw halafinay a pakatengil to nika'efer ni Maawil,orasaka, tayra a mipalafang ci Maawilan. Litemohen ni Maawil koya Pyuma a tamdaw, kinatolo a mifalic to riko', sakakinacecay o tolak no tomay, sakakinatosa o taloak no lokadaw, sakakinatolo o makamiday a kolah. Safaheka sa koya Pyuma a tamdaw, nikawrira, harateng han nangra o pikalona ni Maawil koni saan,laliw sato a ma'emin. Ya minokay koya Pyuma a tamdaw, malitemoh nangra ko kaying no Tomiyac niyaro',matayen nangra kina kaying. Mafana' ci Maawil tina demak, tadatata'ang ko keter ningra,orasaka, mipatay to kaying no Pyuma a paco'ay. Nanoyanan tata'ang tata'ang ko sapipaco'ayaw faloco' ni Maawil, cilacila a ma'efer tayra i niyaro' no Pyuma a militangal. Ora sato o Pyuma a tamdaw misaharaterateng to sapifarataw to pilitangal ni Maawil. Paco'ay ci Maawil 馬阿維報仇 Nengengen nangra i sera awa ko naripa'an ni Maawil, nani kafekangay a ma'efer sato ko piketon no sowal. Ira to ko nga'ayay a maharatengay no Pyuma a tamdaw, co'eneken nangra ko nicideman a 'aol i karomakatan ni Maawil,caka fana' ci Maawil tahafikod tona macidemay a 'aol macocok ko tiyad sadak sato ko tina'i ora to ko sakapatay ni Maawil. Mafana' to ko Tomiyac a niyaro' to kapatay ni Maawil, caka'eca ka tayni ko Pyuma a tamdaw a mipaco'ay, orasaka, o polong no niyaro' maforaw tayra i Cikasoan. Lalengatan no militangal出草的開始 Cisowal sa ko malitengay to wawa, "akaa ka matira ci Maawilan, maforaw ko niyaro' kasini'adaan ko finawlan, ci Maawil ko milengatay to matiniay a demak" saan. Ciharateng sato ko ka'emangay, saw iro mafelih ko sowal no malitengay, o Pyuma a tamdaw ko milengatay a mipatay to kaying no Takidis, o mipa'adingay ci Maawil to niyaro' sa tayra mipaco'ay to Pyuma a tamdaw, ano awaay ko pipa'ading ni Maawil, awa to ko tolas no Pyuma a tamdaw a mikari'ang to niyaro' no 'Amis kiya. == Pacefaday a tilid 註釋 ==
S.PHON: == ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ ato~u miɾitaŋaɾ ***** == miɾijas to~u nijaro~uʡ ʦi maawiɾ ******* ira ko~u ʦəʦaj a kapaħ ʦi maawiɾ ko~u ŋaŋan niŋra, itiraaj i takiɬ~ɮis ko~u ɾo~umaʡ niŋra. ʦaajaj ka ħajiən no~u nijaro~uʡaj a finawɾan to~u sakaɾakakəriɬ~ɮan, makətər samafo~uraw tajra i to~umijaʦ a nijaro~uʡ. tajni to~u to~una nijaro~uʡ ira ko~u kakafaħəkaan a ɬ~ɮəmak,o~u pifaɾo~uɬ~ɮ aʦa niŋra i faɬ~ɮaŋɾan ato~u pakiħ sano~u ʡajam sanaj to~u a maʡəfər. mafanaʡ to~u ko~u takiɬ~ɮisaj a tamɬ~ɮaw,sapitaħiɬ~ɮaŋaw papino~ukaj patiko~ur maɾakakəriɬ~ɮan,ʦo~uwa ka ɾiwaɾiwaən niŋra ko~u pisataʡo~utaʡo~uŋ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u takiɬ~ɮis,ɾapɾapən niŋra a pano~ukaj ko~uja takiɬ~ɮisaj a tamɬ~ɮaw, takawən niŋra a miʡo~ufaŋ ko~u tamina no~u takiɬ~ɮis, jo~u mino~ukaj sato~u maɾənəŋ a maʡaɾo~uɾ ko~uja tamɬ~ɮaw no~u takiɬ~ɮis i rijar. mipataj ko~u pjo~u~uma a tamɬ~ɮaw to~u kajiŋ no~u ʡamis o~u pjo~u~uma atamɬ~ɮaw ħaɾafinaj a pakatəŋiɾ to~u nikaʡəfər ni maawiɾ,o~urasaka, tajra a mipaɾafaŋ ʦi maawiɾan. ɾitəmo~uħən ni maawiɾ ko~uja pjo~u~uma a tamɬ~ɮaw, kinato~uɾo~u a mifaɾiʦ to~u riko~uʡ, sakakinaʦəʦaj o~u to~uɾak no~u to~umaj, sakakinato~usa o~u taɾo~uak no~u ɾo~ukaɬ~ɮaw, sakakinato~uɾo~u o~u makamiɬ~ɮaj a ko~uɾaħ. safaħəka sa ko~uja pjo~u~uma a tamɬ~ɮaw, nikawrira, ħaratəŋ ħan naŋra o~u pikaɾo~una ni maawiɾ ko~uni saan,ɾaɾiw sato~u a maʡəmin. ja mino~ukaj ko~uja pjo~u~uma a tamɬ~ɮaw, maɾitəmo~uħ naŋra ko~u kajiŋ no~u to~umijaʦ nijaro~uʡ,matajən naŋra kina kajiŋ. mafanaʡ ʦi maawiɾ tina ɬ~ɮəmak, taɬ~ɮatataʡaŋ ko~u kətər niŋra,o~urasaka, mipataj to~u kajiŋ no~u pjo~u~uma a paʦo~uʡaj. nano~ujanan tataʡaŋ tataʡaŋ ko~u sapipaʦo~uʡajaw faɾo~uʦo~uʡ ni maawiɾ, ʦiɾaʦiɾa a maʡəfər tajra i nijaro~uʡ no~u pjo~u~uma a miɾitaŋaɾ. o~ura sato~u o~u pjo~u~uma a tamɬ~ɮaw misaħaratəratəŋ to~u sapifarataw to~u piɾitaŋaɾ ni maawiɾ. paʦo~uʡaj ʦi maawiɾ ***** nəŋəŋən naŋra i səra awa ko~u naripaʡan ni maawiɾ, nani kafəkaŋaj a maʡəfər sato~u ko~u pikəto~un no~u so~uwaɾ. ira to~u ko~u ŋaʡajaj a maħaratəŋaj no~u pjo~u~uma a tamɬ~ɮaw, ʦo~uʡənəkən naŋra ko~u niʦiɬ~ɮəman a ʡao~uɾ i karo~umakatan ni maawiɾ,ʦaka fanaʡ ʦi maawiɾ taħafiko~uɬ~ɮ to~una maʦiɬ~ɮəmaj a ʡao~uɾ maʦo~uʦo~uk ko~u tijaɬ~ɮ saɬ~ɮak sato~u ko~u tinaʡi o~ura to~u ko~u sakapataj ni maawiɾ. mafanaʡ to~u ko~u to~umijaʦ a nijaro~uʡ to~u kapataj ni maawiɾ, ʦakaʡəʦa ka tajni ko~u pjo~u~uma a tamɬ~ɮaw a mipaʦo~uʡaj, o~urasaka, o~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u nijaro~uʡ mafo~uraw tajra i ʦikaso~uan. ɾaɾəŋatan no~u miɾitaŋaɾ***** ʦiso~uwaɾ sa ko~u maɾitəŋaj to~u wawa, "akaa ka matira ʦi maawiɾan, mafo~uraw ko~u nijaro~uʡ kasiniʡaɬ~ɮaan ko~u finawɾan, ʦi maawiɾ ko~u miɾəŋataj to~u matiniaj a ɬ~ɮəmak" saan. ʦiħaratəŋ sato~u ko~u kaʡəmaŋaj, saw iro~u mafəɾiħ ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u maɾitəŋaj, o~u pjo~u~uma a tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u miɾəŋataj a mipataj to~u kajiŋ no~u takiɬ~ɮis, o~u mipaʡaɬ~ɮiŋaj ʦi maawiɾ to~u nijaro~uʡ sa tajra mipaʦo~uʡaj to~u pjo~u~uma a tamɬ~ɮaw, ano~u awaaj ko~u pipaʡaɬ~ɮiŋ ni maawiɾ, awa to~u ko~u to~uɾas no~u pjo~u~uma a tamɬ~ɮaw a mikariʡaŋ to~u nijaro~uʡ no~u ʡamis kija. == paʦəfaɬ~ɮaj a tiɾiɬ~ɮ ** ==
